scenario.name: OPTIONS
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: ping <sip:ping@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: pong <sip:pong@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
